name: Qualified Conservation Easement Exclusion

eligibility.description: The executor must elect this on the estate tax return. The land must have been owned by the decedent or family for 3 years prior to death and be subject to a qualified conservation contribution.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Excludes up to 40% of the value of land subject to a qualified conservation easement from the gross estate, capped at $500,000.
